descriptions.text: Super Metroid Redux is an improvement hack for Super Metroid, and a continuation of Super Metroid: GBA Style. This hack aims to give Super Metroid a whole lot of improvements, being it graphical or in mechanics/gameplay, and address some of the annoyances from the original, such as increasing the speed of elevator transitions, improved weapon selection, the diagonal aiming style from Metroid: Zero Mission, and the additional option for widescreen (specific emulators only).
